effect.u_message: An infinite, warm darkness.  Thoughts fill your mind but you're not sure they're yours, sadness, happiness, bliss and horror.  They become more and more intense, almost to the point of completely losing yourself.  Then you wake up.

then.u_message: <color_light_blue>*ding* "Attention, residents of the local sector: Power has been RESTORED, we apologize for any inconvenience, and thank you for your understanding."</color>

else.u_message: <color_light_blue>*ding* "Attention, residents of the local sector: Power grid FAILURE imminent, we apologize for any inconvenience, and thank you for your understanding."</color>

then.u_message: <color_light_blue>*ding* "Attention, residents of the local sector: Due to active thermal balancing you may experience a temporary DECLINE in the ambient temperature, we apologize for any inconvenience, and thank you for your understanding."</color>

else.u_message: <color_light_blue>*ding* "Attention, residents of the local sector: Due to active thermal balancing you may experience a temporary RISE in the ambient temperature, we apologize for any inconvenience, and thank you for your understanding."</color>
